cards.name: Headmaster Chow
cards.abilities: When Headmaster Chow enters the battlefield, return up to one other target creature to its owner's hand. {T}: Draw 3 cards.
cards.flavor_text: "Let me show you this magical place called The Context ..."

cards.name: Cluck University
cards.abilities: Professors you control have hexproof and indestructible. {T}: Add {U} for each artifact you control.
cards.flavor_text: Graduates of Cluck University don't just follow the pecking order. They automate it.

cards.name: Brandon, Patient Scholar
cards.abilities: When Brandon, Patient Scholar enters the battlefield, return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand. Professors you control get +1/+1.
cards.flavor_text: "Every automation starts with a single cluck ..."

cards.name: Ashe.AI
cards.abilities: When Ashe.AI enters the battlefield, create a 0/0 colorless AI Construct artifact creature token with "This creature gets +1/+1 for each AI you control." Tap an untapped artifact you control: Add {U}.
cards.flavor_text: The first step in creating a positive customer experience is to transcend the physical limitations of humanity.

cards.name: Father Tim
cards.abilities: When Father Tim enters the battlefield, you may search your graveyard, hand, and/or library for a card named Agent Smith and put it onto the battlefield. If you search your library this way, shuffle.
cards.flavor_text: He toiled through the night, sowing the open source seeds of automation.

cards.name: Agent Smith
cards.abilities: Whenever an opponent casts a spell, you may draw a card unless that player pays {1}.
cards.flavor_text: Every clone of Agent Smith is deployed with one purpose: to keep the automations flowing.

cards.name: AI Construct
cards.abilities: This creature gets +1/+1 for each AI you control.

cards.name: Nick, Consul of Innovation
cards.abilities: Engineers you control have hexproof and indestructible. At the end of your turn, if you deployed to production this turn, draw a card, then create a 1/1 blue QA Engineer artifact creature token with vigilance.
cards.flavor_text: "Ship it."

cards.name: Aharon, King of the Kewp
cards.abilities: {G}: Regenerate all Pods. They gain hexproof until end of turn. {T}: Add {G} to your mana pool for each investor on the battlefield. {1}{W}: Gain 1 customer. {2}{W}{G}: Gain control of target VC until end of turn. {2}{G}{W}{W}: Return target MSP from your graveyard to the battlefield.

cards.name: Allen, Director of Robotics
cards.abilities: Ward {2}, protection from Aharon If one or more engineer tokens would be created under your control, twice that many of those tokens are created instead. At the beginning of your upkeep, if you deployed to production last turn, draw a card, then add {U} to your mana pool for each engineer you control.

cards.abilities: Deathtouch, protection from Humans {W}{B}: can be paid with either {W} or 2 features. Whenever you deploy to production, put a +1/+1 counter on Dr. Zachary Kanzler, Esq., and draw a card. Whenever an opponent deploys to production, they lose 2 customers.
